overall.description: A first-person perspective walk along the deck of a cargo ship at night, rendered in a game engine. The camera moves steadily forward toward the illuminated bridge superstructure marked 'VIKING', with artificial deck lighting casting red tones on the metal surfaces. Atmospheric fog gradually envelops the scene as the camera advances along the narrow walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: cargo ship deck walkway at night

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the ship's deck toward the illuminated bridge superstructure

entered.detail: white multi-level ship bridge with 'VIKING' text and illuminated windows
red painted ship structure with safety lights running along the port side
red metal safety railing along the edge of the deck
orange circular life preserver mounted on the starboard railing
illuminated safety lights casting red glow on the deck surface

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow cargo ship deck at night, with the camera walking forward toward the distant illuminated bridge marked 'VIKING'. Red safety railings line the starboard side with an orange life preserver visible, while the port side features a red bulkhead with safety lighting. The deck is empty and the atmosphere is clear.

scene_state.functional_zone: cargo ship deck with increasing maritime fog

events.description: thick white fog begins rolling in from the starboard side, reducing visibility

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the deck as atmospheric fog envelops the starboard side

entered.detail: thick white maritime fog rolling in from the ocean, partially obscuring the view
short yellow-topped bollards for mooring lines positioned on the deck

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues walking forward, the ship's bridge looms closer while thick maritime fog rolls in from the starboard side, creating an atmospheric haze. The port bulkhead recedes into the distance as the camera passes the life preserver and approaches the bollards and deck equipment near the bridge structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a cargo ship deck at night that transforms from a clear environment into a dense, atmospheric haze. It begins on a narrow walkway heading toward the distant, illuminated bridge marked VIKING, with red safety railings and an orange life preserver lining the starboard side. As the camera advances, the port bulkhead recedes and the bridge looms closer, while thick maritime fog begins to roll in from the starboard side. The scene then shifts as the haze envelops the deck, obscuring the distance while the camera passes the life preserver to approach the bollards and equipment near the ship's superstructure.
